title: Update peer routing (Announce/LOADng/Gradient) and summary sections for Yggdrasil fallback
description: Update sections 9-12 in spec/05-routing.md: revise when LOADng/gradient used for 02xx peers, update gradient table, summary diagrams/tables, opportunistic/DTN rules to reflect local-mesh-first for 02xx before Yggdrasil routing. Ensure consistency with 04-network.md single-primary model. Update any remaining off-mesh or external routing examples.
